actions.plan:

The previous action was intended to click "同意并登录," but it seems that the system has triggered a CAPTCHA verification instead. This indicates that the login process requires completing the CAPTCHA before proceeding. Since the task involves searching for hotels and making a reservation, solving the CAPTCHA is essential to move forward.

(Screenshot Analysis)
The current screenshot shows a CAPTCHA verification dialog with instructions to drag the pieces into the correct order. The prompt specifies "向右滑动填充拼图," which means "Swipe right to fill the puzzle." Completing this task will allow us to proceed with the login process.

(Next Action)
Solve the CAPTCHA by dragging the pieces into the correct order as instructed.

(Grounded Action)
```python
agent.drag_and_drop(starting_description="左most puzzle piece", ending_description="right side of the image", hold_keys=[])
```
actions: # Drag from 左most puzzle piece to right side of the image
